title: Purely Optimized
description: Optimization and qol mods allowed on Purity Vanilla
body:
A set of fabric optimization and QOL mods, all of which are allowed on Purity Vanilla as per https://blog.purityvanilla.com/Rules-Clarification/.

This is distinct from the other optimization+QOL packs because the server this targets is very, very strict with allowed mods. This provides an easy way for players to download mods without having to pick through the list and potentially be banned. It also includes several allowed QOL mods in order to make gameplay just a little more bearable.

Some (but not all) of the mods included are:
- Sodium, for general fps boost
- WhyMap, a fairplay world map mod made specifically for Purity
- NoChatReports, a mod to prevent people from chat reporting you
- NoTelemetry, to make it harder for the corporate overlords to spy on you
- Xaero's **fairplay** minimap, a minimap with waypoints which does not show entities

This will continued to be updated as Purity updates, and mods will be added/removed in accordance with the list of allowed mods.
